summary: Iteration 2 testing covers the lobby-photo-leak bug fix plus new host settings + kick endpoints. Backend exhaustive coverage of GET /rooms (lobby), settings (host/non-host, valid/invalid duration, rounds_count range), kick (self/non-host/valid), gameplay propagation of settings, and post-start mutation rejection. Frontend lobby UI verified — InitialAvatar replaces , no childhood photo leak, host-settings card present, duration & rounds buttons render, click on duration-20 propagates to backend state.
passed: GET /api/rooms/{code} in lobby returns players[].photo == '' for ALL players (photo leak fixed)
GET /api/rooms/{code} during 'playing' status also keeps players[].photo == '' (only question.photo set for the round target)
POST /api/rooms/{code}/settings valid (duration=20, rounds=2) returns 200 and GET reflects the values
POST /api/rooms/{code}/kick host kicking another player returns 200 and player list shrinks
Frontend home loads, Create Room flow works
Lobby page shows InitialAvatar (data-testid=avatar-*) with ZERO tags inside player cards (0/1 cards have )
host-settings card visible with all 4 duration buttons (duration-10/15/20/30) and rounds-all
Clicking duration-20 in UI persists to backend (GET /rooms confirmed round_duration_s=20)
'Photos hidden' indicator rendered (verified visually in screenshot)
notes: WebSocket-specific assertions (broadcast payload strips photos, kicked player receives {type:'kicked'} + 4403 close) were not tested via raw WS client in this latency-sensitive pass; the underlying public_state() function used by both REST and WS broadcasts has been confirmed to strip photos when status != 'finished'. RoundResult mid-game standings switch to InitialAvatar verified by code review of /app/frontend/src/components/game/RoundResult.jsx (out of scope for live UI test since it requires 2+ players & 20s round). Final leaderboard photo reveal verified by code path: public_state() sets show_photos=True only when status=='finished'.
